disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Two Singapore residents who were on board MV Hondius complete hantavirus quarantine - The Straits Times
updates.body_en: Two Singapore residents who were on board MV Hondius complete hantavirus quarantine The Straits Times
